integrated_heat_fuel_boundary: Aggregate methods own cement kiln heat fuel electricity clinker substitution and final grinding while the direct pathway bundle is selected.
process_emissions_boundary: Process emissions are clinker calcination coefficients expressed on a cement-equivalent output basis and remain inside the aggregate method until decomposition is selected.
ccs_boundary: The CCS pathway uses capture_service as a bundled proxy for captured cement CO2 until the decomposed branch links source streams to capture transport and storage roles.
double_counting_guardrail: The aggregate pathway bundle must not run at the same time as make_cement_equivalent__clinker_decomposition or duplicate the make_other_material_products folded high-temperature industrial heat coefficients for cement output.
notes: Summary row for validating the direct aggregate cement representation before decomposed child roles are authored.
